top_signals.title: Iran oil waiver offers lifeline to Tehran as talks proceed
top_signals.summary: Hanging over the delicate discussions is the status of the Strait of Hormuz and the continued fighting in Lebanon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Boost California Prices
top_signals.summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: British Columbia gold miner sues province over “stripped” mining rights
top_signals.summary: MCC Canadian Gold Ventures said the province had previously lobbied the company to rescue a bankrupt, environmentally compromised gold mine on Banks Island.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
top_signals.summary: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
